actions.expression:
SELECT cjcp.sid,
       cjcp.yytp,
       cjcp.cpggz,
       cjcp.zwpm,
       cjcp.ywpm,
       cjcp.jldw,
       cjcp.zwdw,
       cjcp.cgdj,
       cjcp.bgpm,
       cjcp.hgbm,
       cjcp.tsl,
       cjcp.bzdw,
       cjcp.bzrl,
       cjcp.bztj,
       cjcp.zhwbzh,
       cjcp.bzhfsh,
       cjcp.zxcgl,
       cjcp.cgry,
       cjcp.cpfl,
       cjcp.yjfl,
       cjcp.ejfl,
       cjcp.mxmz,
       cjcp.mxjz,
       cjcp.chpchc,
       cjcp.caiziz,
       cjcp.sjfl,
       cjcp.sccj,
       cjcp.yse
FROM cjcp 
WHERE (cjcp.cpbh=[样品管理.入库产品信息.产品编号]) 
ORDER BY cjcp.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT ypglsheet1.sid,
       ypglsheet1.cpbh,
       ypglsheet1.zwpm,
       ypglsheet1.yytp,
       ypglsheet1.ywpm,
       ypglsheet1.cpgg,
       ypglsheet1.cpfl,
       ypglsheet1.jldw,
       ypglsheet1.yjfl,
       ypglsheet1.ejfl,
       ypglsheet1.sjfl,
       ypglsheet1.bzdw,
       ypglsheet1.bzrl,
       ypglsheet1.bztj,
       ypglsheet1.zhwbzh,
       ypglsheet1.bzhfsh,
       ypglsheet1.zwdw,
       ypglsheet1.cgdj,
       ypglsheet1.bgpm,
       ypglsheet1.hgbm,
       ypglsheet1.tsl,
       ypglsheet1.zxcgl,
       ypglsheet1.sccj,
       ypglsheet1.cgry,
       ypglsheet1.cjID,
       ypglsheet1.rksl,
       ypglsheet1.mxmz,
       ypglsheet1.mxjz,
       ypglsheet1.chpchc,
       ypglsheet1.caizi,
       ypglsheet1.yse,
       ypglsheet1.wyzd,
       ypglsheet1.lxm,
       ypglsheet1.cpbh1
FROM ypglsheet1 
WHERE (ypglsheet1.cpbh=[样品管理.产品编号]) 
  AND (ypglsheet1.lxm<>[样品管理.条 形 码]) 
ORDER BY ypglsheet1.sid ASC

actions.expression:
select * from (select
    cjcp.cpbh,
    cjcp.lxm,
    cjcp.rkrq,
    cjcp.yse,
    cjcp.zwpm,
    cjcp.ywpm,
    cjcp.jldw,
    cjcp.zwdw,
    cjcp.cgdj,
    cjcp.cpggz,
    cjcp.bgpm,
    cjcp.hgbm,
    cjcp.tsl,
    cjcp.bzdw,
    cjcp.bzrl,
    cjcp.bzcd,
    cjcp.bzkd,
    cjcp.bzgd,
    cjcp.bztj,
    cjcp.zhwbzh,
    cjcp.bzhfsh,
    cjcp.mxmz,
    cjcp.mxjz,
    cjcp.chpchc,
    cjcp.cplx,
    cjcp.zxcgl,
    cjcp.cgry,
    cjcp.yjfl,
    cjcp.ejfl,
    cjcp.sjfl,
    cjcp.sccj,
    cjcp.gcID,
    1 sort_id 
from cjcp
where cjcp.cpbh=[样品管理.产品编号] or (cjcp.krhh=[样品管理.产品编号] and ifnull(cjcp.krhh,""<>""))
union all 
select
    zscp.cpbh,
    zscp.lxm,
    zscp.rkrq,
    zscp.yse,
    zscp.zwpm,
    zscp.ywpm,
    zscp.jldw,
    zscp.zwdw,
    zscp.cgdj,
    zscp.cpggz,
    zscp.bgpm,
    zscp.hgbm,
    zscp.tsl,
    zscp.bzdw,
    zscp.bzrl,
    zscp.bzcd,
    zscp.bzkd,
    zscp.bzgd,
    zscp.bztj,
    zscp.zhwbzh,
    zscp.bzhfsh,
    zscp.mxmz,
    zscp.mxjz,
    zscp.chpchc,
    zscp.cplx,
    zscp.zxcgl,
    zscp.cgry,
    zscp.yjfl,
    zscp.ejfl,
    zscp.sjfl,
    zscp.sccj,
    zscp.gcID,
    0 sort_id 
from zscp
where zscp.cpbh=[样品管理.产品编号] or (zscp.krhh=[样品管理.产品编号] and ifnull(zscp.krhh,""<>""))) a order by sort_id asc limit 1
actions.caption: 事_产品编号

view.params:
SELECT zycpfenglb.cpfl
FROM zycpfenglb
group by zycpfenglb.cpfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.yjfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[样品管理.产品分类]) group by zycpfenglb.yjfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.ejfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[样品管理.产品分类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.yjfl=[样品管理.一级分类])  group by zycpfenglb.ejfl

SELECT cyzglsheet.xm
FROM cyzglsheet
WHERE  (cyzglsheet.zm="样品间区域标志")
ORDER BY cyzglsheet.SID ASC

SELECT wfgs.wfgs
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.wfgs ASC

宁波
汕头

SELECT ypgl.cpbh,ypgl.SID
FROM ypgl
WHERE   (ypgl.wyzd=[样品管理.唯一字段])
ORDER BY ypgl.SID ASC

SELECT zycpfenglb.cpfl
FROM zycpfenglb
group by zycpfenglb.cpfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.yjfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[样品管理.产品分类]) group by zycpfenglb.yjfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.ejfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[样品管理.产品分类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.yjfl=[样品管理.一级分类])  group by zycpfenglb.ejfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.sjfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[样品管理.产品分类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.yjfl=[样品管理.一级分类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.ejfl=[样品管理.二级分类]) group by zycpfenglb.sjfl

SELECT bzdw.dwdm,bzdw.SID
FROM bzdw
ORDER BY bzdw.SID ASC

SELECT bzhfsh.zhwbzh,bzhfsh.SID
FROM bzhfsh
ORDER BY bzhfsh.SID ASC

view.btns: 入库产品信息_生产厂家

view.params:
SELECT ywrybiao.yhm ,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
ORDER BY ywrybiao.yhm ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   ((ywrybiao.zw like "%采购%") or (ywrybiao.zw like "%外销%") or (ywrybiao.zw like "%跟单%")) and (ywrybiao.zt not like "%离职%")
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC
